name: Athens Greek Salad
method: To make this dish, choose a medium-sized dish.
To make four bits, cut the tomatoes in half lengthwise, then in the
Put in a mixing bowl. Put the cucumber in the bowl after peeling it
and cutting it into ½ -inch sections.
Position the spring onions and green bell pepper in the bowl after
slicing them. Toss in the olives.
Add the capers, marjoram, salt, and white pepper to taste.
On top of the veggies, sprinkle the feta cheese.
Mix thoroughly with a gentle drizzle of olive oil.
